title: Linear Congruential Generator (LCG) Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of generating a pseudorandom number sequence using a Linear Congruential Generator, highlighting its components and deterministic nature.
relationships: The algorithm uses the formula: Xₙ₊₁ = (a * Xₙ + c) mod m. The current state (Seed) is processed with the Multiplier and Increment, then taken Modulus to generate a New State, which is output as a Pseudorandom Number and becomes the next Seed.
